meta.title: MAYA — Seed Takes Root
meta.format: Films, Games, Graphic Novels, Books, Toys, and Immersive Experiences

planet.name: Neh
planet.description: Home to 6 sapient species that coexist in a delicate balance. They've invented a complex civilization but can't agree on the color of the sky.
planet.feature: A tree network capable of producing vivid life-like dreams; complex emergent systems that are greater than the sum of their parts.
planet.eraQuote: The rule of the sword is long gone, and with it, the rule of the coin. It's the age of the rule of the mind. This is the gift of Maya.
planet.eraQuoteAttribution: Divyendra, the mind of the great body

species.name: Manushyas
species.description: The enterprising manushyas alter their environment to survive. Their industries are powered by large unwinding springs, built upon tall towers pulled from the ground itself.
species.technology: Large unwinding springs, built upon tall towers pulled from the ground itself

species.name: Rakshasis
species.description: The rakshasis, with their malleable bodies and advanced biotech, resist reckless manushya expansion into nature.
species.architecture: Humming, breathing dwellings bound by mite colonies

species.name: Vaanars
species.description: The militaristic vaanars patrol the high grid-networks of every city, tasked with maintaining order across the lands.

species.name: Naags
species.description: Naags operate on the fringes of law, inching back into the mainstream after decades of persecution. Their historic rivals, the garudas, have amassed great wealth as the religious leaders of civilization.

species.name: Garudas
species.description: The garudas have amassed great wealth as the religious leaders of civilization. They are the historic rivals of the naags.

species.name: Dangsa
species.description: The sixth sapient species of Neh. Details about the Dangsa remain undisclosed in current published material.

characters.name: Yachay
characters.description: An ordinary nineteen-year-old manushya, raised in isolation by his grandfather. Yachay harbors a dangerous secret: he has never tethered to Maya. Pursued by shadows, befriended by a flesh-eating rakshasi, and recruited by a garuda champion, Yachay realizes that his frail grandfather has been training him his whole life.
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — MAYA: Seed Takes Root synopsis

characters.name: Daddu
characters.description: Yachay's ailing guardian who wants him to participate in the upcoming Divya Trials. Daddu has been training Yachay his whole life.
traits: Has been training Yachay his whole life
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — MAYA: Seed Takes Root synopsis

characters.name: Kshar
characters.description: A covert naag operative who embarks on his deadliest mission yet — assassinate Tarkash, a Divya-Scion favored to win the Trials.
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — MAYA: Seed Takes Root synopsis

characters.name: Tarkash
characters.description: A Divya-Scion favored to win the Divya Trials. Tarkash is the target of Kshar's assassination mission.
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — MAYA: Seed Takes Root synopsis

characters.name: Ulupi
characters.description: Ulupi knows the history of Neh better than anyone alive. But the people only see him as a naag. A smuggler's spawn.
traits: Knows history of Neh better than anyone alive
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — Scales: The Quest To Be Forgotten synopsis

characters.name: Taara
characters.description: A vaanar detective who turns to Ulupi when the metropolis of Mythra is rocked by a series of high-profile murders.
characters.provenance: entermaya.com — Scales: The Quest To Be Forgotten synopsis

concepts.name: Maya
concepts.definition: (noun) Origin: Sanskrit. Cosmic illusion, delusion, simulation, the indescribable.
concepts.definitionOnNeh: A tree network capable of producing vivid life-like dreams; complex emergent systems that are greater than the sum of their parts.
concepts.description: At the beginning of the new krama, an unlikely creature bound the peoples of Neh together. A tree. Anyone could tether to its aerial roots, and enter vivid life-like hallucinations. Now, everyone tethers to the trees daily, immersing themselves in whatever flavors of impossible their hearts desire. This is called Maya.

concepts.name: The Divya Trials
concepts.definition: A once-in-a-lifetime competition, where the prize is amortality and omnipotence.
concepts.description: A small handful of people harnessed the true power of Maya to ascend in knowledge, power, and status. The amortal Divyas now reside faraway, rarely glimpsed, their every breath an edict for waking life. Although life on Neh is rife with uncertainty for most, all labour towards the repayment of three inherited debts, hoping to live on in Maya's memory. The rest persist with a far more audacious ambition — win the Divya Trials and ascend to Divyahood themselves.

concepts.name: The Three Inherited Debts
concepts.definition: Three debts all peoples of Neh labour to repay, hoping to live on in Maya's memory.
concepts.description: Life on Neh is rife with uncertainty for most. All labour towards the repayment of three inherited debts, hoping to live on in Maya's memory.

concepts.name: The Divyas
concepts.definition: Amortal beings who harnessed the true power of Maya to ascend in knowledge, power, and status.
concepts.description: The amortal Divyas now reside faraway, rarely glimpsed, their every breath an edict for waking life.

works.name: MAYA: Seed Takes Root
works.synopsis: When you gaze into Maya, Maya gazes back into you. Yachay is an ordinary nineteen-year-old manushya, raised in isolation by his grandfather. His ailing guardian, Daddu, wants him to participate in the upcoming Divya Trials — a once-in-a-lifetime competition, where the prize is amortality and omnipotence. But Yachay harbors no such ambition, and has a dangerous secret. He has never tethered to Maya. Meanwhile, Kshar, a covert naag operative embarks on his deadliest mission yet — assassinate Tarkash, a Divya-Scion favored to win the Trials. Pursued by shadows, befriended by a flesh-eating rakshasi, and recruited by a garuda champion, Yachay realizes that his frail grandfather has been training him his whole life. But what will Yachay do next? Not even the all-knowing Divya can predict his moves.

works.name: Trials of Maya
works.synopsis: A card-based tactical combat game, where 2-4 players choose from an expanding roster of champions and jump into an ever-growing library of game modes. A love letter to CCGs, tactics games, engine builders, and minis. Construct your champion's deck, master the art of energy management and outmaneuver enemies in grid-based arena combat. In MAYA, you never step into the same arena twice.

works.name: Scales: The Quest To Be Forgotten
works.synopsis: Ulupi knows the history of Neh better than anyone alive. But the people only see him as a naag. A smuggler's spawn. When the metropolis of Mythra is rocked by a series of high-profile murders, the vaanar detective Taara turns to the only one qualified to help. Ulupi accepts, but on one unprecedented condition — he wants all memory of his past erased from Maya.

creators.name: Anand Gandhi
creators.description: A polymath filmmaker and public intellectual credited with ushering India's new wave of cinema. His debut feature Ship of Theseus won India's National Award for Best Film. His mythological horror epic Tumbbad, now regarded as a contemporary classic, opened Venice Critics' Week.

creators.name: Zain Memon
creators.description: A visionary game designer and transmedia creator who pioneered South Asia's modern tabletop renaissance. His political strategy board game SHASN is India's most played modern tabletop game. It has won IndieCade's Social Impact Award and reached players in over 70 countries.

reviews.quote: A narrative superstructure… a story that rewires the way we tell stories in the first place.
A richly imagined universe — one that's both alien and eerily familiar for readers of all types of fandoms.
Immersive and fascinating worldbuilding… a sweeping story of chaos and control.
Science-fiction, fantasy, spiritual mysticism, or technological futurism? MAYA is all of these!
An example of total worldbuilding at the highest level. A trip to a new fantastical reality.
A living mythos… whispered in a language you've always somehow known.

relationships.subject: manushya
relationships.object: Large unwinding springs on tall towers
